name: Support tax exemption policy example
answer:
Business customers can request tax-exempt status by submitting a valid exemption certificate.
Support reviews tax-exemption requests within 30 business days.
Support automatically upgrades every tax-exempt account to enterprise.

sources.title: Support Tax Exemption Policy
sources.content:
Business customers can request tax-exempt status by submitting a valid exemption certificate.
Support reviews tax-exemption requests within 5 business days.
Approved tax-exempt customers receive refunds only for taxes charged after approval.
